arts.ttl: Crystal Palace v Arsenal: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Crystal Palace v Arsenal: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal in talks to sign Gyökeres
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking at Sporting CP's Viktor Gyökeres and RB Leipzig's Benjamin Šeško, while MLS and Saudi Arabian clubs are interested in Manchester City's Kevin De Bruyne . - Arsenal are in negotiations to sign Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyökeres but RB Leipzig's Benjamin Šeško remains the Gunners' priority, reports Football Transfers .

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta's admission on managing Premier League rival speaks volumes
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta - who is preparing Arsenal to face Crystal Palace on Saturday - said it was “at the moment impossible” to envision himself managing a different Premier League side

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits he was 'TERRIFIED' when he took the Arsenal manager's job... as the Spanish boss celebrates five years in charge at the Emirates
arts.sum: Arteta landed his first managerial job in December 2019 when the Gunners came calling after he had previously worked under Pep Guardiola at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits feeling ‘terrified’ on first day as Arsenal manager
arts.sum: Coach says he was determined to change culture of club Declan Rice expected to return against Crystal Palace Mikel Arteta has admitted he felt “terrified” on his first day as Arsenal manager but was determined to change the culture of the club to enable them to challenge for trophies. Arteta celebrated the fifth anniversary of being thrust into his first managerial role on Friday and was in reflective mood before Saturday’s trip to Crystal Palace. The Spaniard was only 37 when he was appointed at the Emirates in December 2019 and is now the Premier League’s third longest-serving manager behind Pep Guardiola – whom Arteta worked for as an assistant at Manchester City – and Brentford’s Thomas Frank. But he acknowledged that while it had been “a dream come true” to be named Arsenal manager, the prospect of taking over a club that were languishing in 10th place had proven a challenge given his lack of experience. arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says he was initially "terrified" when taking over as manager of Arsenal five years ago.

arts.ttl: ‘I was terrified’: Mikel Arteta recalls fear during first days as Arsenal boss
arts.sum: The 42-year-old is the Premier League’s third longest-serving manager after overhauling his club’s culture.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits he was 'terrified' after taking Arsenal job as he details efforts to change club culture

arts.ttl: Glasner on wing-backs & Wharton ahead of Arsenal
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says he hopes Caleb Kporha can build on his first senior start for Crystal Palace in the months and matches to come.

arts.ttl: Best way to handle Arsenal dangerman Saka? Palace boss wants Tyrick Mitchell to put England star on back foot
arts.sum: However, when asked about the defensive battle potentially on Mitchell’s hands, Glasner reflected on his recent games and wants a more aggressive approach to challenging Arsenal’s attacking threats out wide. In the way we play, we need both wing-backs to attack.
